summary: Classified the five open inventory PRs independently. No shared canonical exists for this shard, no security-sensitive refs were detected, and close/merge/fix/raise-pr paths are disabled or blocked by the job gates. Focused bug-fix PRs and PRs with maintainer-review or technical-correctness gates are left for maintainer decision instead of mutation.

actions.reason: Requires maintainer technical/product judgment on the device approval fallback semantics; no merge, fix, close, or raise-pr action is allowed in this job.
Requires maintainer proof/technical-correctness judgment before any landing path; merge and fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter.
Keep open as an independent docs PR; no close or merge action is allowed or warranted in this shard.
Focused bug-fix PR still needs maintainer technical-correctness review or author/maintainer follow-up; this job cannot repair or merge it.
Requires maintainer technical-correctness/proof judgment and branch repair outside this close-only inventory job.

needs_human: #66257: maintainer decision needed on compatibility-sensitive devices CLI fallback semantics and unresolved ClawSweeper review before any landing path.
#72677: maintainer decision needed on whether the supplied redacted run-log proof satisfies the real-behavior proof gate for the broad cron diagnostic change.
#77339: maintainer or author follow-up needed for a focused auto-reply bug-fix PR whose latest ClawSweeper review still says needs changes before merge.
#77442: maintainer decision and branch repair needed for a dirty focused session-delivery PR with unresolved live-proof caveat.
